priorities.title: Charter extraction: 4 dispatch handlers (START_GAME, END_TURN, RETURN_TO_TITLE, UPDATE_AVATAR_POS) + addScore helper from world.ts -> new src/state/gameMode.ts (S15 carry-forward, mechanical, zero behavior change; requirePlayer stays in world.ts)
Lobby JOIN UX BLOCKER: replace Pixi-text + window.keydown hack with HTML <input> overlay (a11y attrs + zIndex + visualViewport guard per Council R1) in src/render/lobbyScreen.ts

GitHub Pages deploy BLOCKER (Standard): Step 1 base=/the-spark/ + .github/workflows/deploy.yml using actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3 + actions/deploy-pages@v4 (Council R1 switch from peaceiris); Step 1.5 public/favicon.svg + public/robots.txt + OG meta in index.html; Step 2 base=/ + public/CNAME=spark-online.space + Squarespace DNS records (CF migration deferred to S17+)
Visual polish (now MANDATORY per Scope Amendment #1): P3.a BETA badge always-visible top-right of canvas (~10 LOC main.ts); P3.b hide spawner ring + legend when gameState in {TITLE, LOBBY}

Closeout: LOCKED §13.1 trystero ^0.20 -> ^0.24 drift fix; NEW §13.9 deployment row (spark-online.space, github.io fallback, actions/deploy-pages@v4 pipeline, no default CSP, favicon/OG); §7 module-map adds gameMode.ts; BACKLOG + reflexion + boot + PDR archive + HANDOFF rotate
